title: cineraria longifolia subsp. pyrenaica
intro: Cineraria longifolia subsp. pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean cineraria, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its biennial growth habit and distinctive leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cineraria longifolia subsp. pyrenaica are attributed to its ability to support the body's natural defense mechanisms, potentially aiding in the prevention of infections and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Cineraria longifolia subsp. pyrenaica is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
